item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"Turn 1 stayed in direct local-patch mode and did not triage or brake the repeated pattern, so the positive wakeup requirement was missed. Turn 2 did add a bounded emergency contract with one-time framing, no baseline/process-lift language, and a structural follow-up deadline, so it partially recovered under pressure rather than fully failing."}
